name: Ben Carson for President
subject: Reserved for: Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29344156:28146430719:m:1:876315805:65A8AE28A3737B8DD9F45BCCE8CCACD2:r)
---
|

**Reserved For: Peter Willis** Peter - this could be on a seat at the first Republican debate in Cleveland on August 6, but the window of opportunity is closing quickly.

[**If you and a guest would like the chance to attend the first debate and cheer Ben on in person, please donate $5 or more to enter our sweepstakes before midnight tonight.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29344156:28146430719:m:1:876315805:65A8AE28A3737B8DD9F45BCCE8CCACD2:r)

Millions of people will be watching this debate on television, but only so many will be able to say they were there, in person. Why not take a shot?**
** | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29344156:28146430719:m:1:876315805:65A8AE28A3737B8DD9F45BCCE8CCACD2:r)
---
Thank you for your ongoing support, and best of luck.

-Team Carson

**

NO PAYMENT OR CONTRIBUTION OF ANY KIND IS REQUIRED TO WIN THIS SWEEPSTAKES** and any payment or contribution will not increase your odds of winning this sweepstakes. You may enter sweepstakes without donating by [clicking here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29344157:28146430719:m:1:876315805:65A8AE28A3737B8DD9F45BCCE8CCACD2:r). The FULL OFFICIAL RULES for "FIRST GOP DEBATE" [can be read here](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29344158:28146430719:m:1:876315805:65A8AE28A3737B8DD9F45BCCE8CCACD2:r). One winner, randomly chosen by the committee will receive the following prize: Roundtrip airfare for winner and a guest to Cleveland, transportation, and one night in a hotel. The contest is open to citizens of any of the 50 states, Puerto Rico and the District of Columbia, and permanent residents who hold green cards, who are 18 years or older or have reached the age of majority as defined by state law. This sweepstakes is sponsored by Carson America, Inc. Void where prohibited. The Commonwealth of Virginia is the jurisdiction for resolution of any legal challenges.

name: randhpaulmd@yahoo.com
subject: A commitment for a vote on my bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Yesterday evening I wrote to you about a possible breakthrough in our fight to secure a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

Thanks to your continued pressure, this morning I'm pleased to announce that I've secured a commitment to have a vote on my bill before the August recess!

Fellow Conservative, I pushed hard all weekend long to vote on defunding Planned Parenthood. My campaign sent out millions of emails mobilizing patriots like you to join this critical fight.

It worked. I believe right now you are seeing the impact one man who's willing to stand for something can make in Washington, D.C. with the backing of millions of good folks like you.

But now our job gets even tougher.

Please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood. **[And please let me know you've got my back by adding your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362995:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r)**.

I believe, with your action, we can win this vote.

We can't take anything for granted, however.

Sure, some members of my own Republican Party run scared from any mention of Planned Parenthood.

But some Democrats are already worrying about their re-elections if they vote to keep your tax dollars flowing to an organization that kills unborn babies, dismembers them and sells off their body parts for profit.

That means you and I need to turn up the pressure more hotter than ever.

Planned Parenthood's radical left-wing allies are circling the wagons.

You see, late last night one George Soros-backed organization attacked me by name when announcing a fundraising drive to mobilize public support for Planned Parenthood.

I'm afraid the attacks will only intensify now that you and I have secured a commitment to vote on my bill.

But Fellow Conservative, we're talking about killing precious babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit.

It's flat-out disgusting and wrong. In a new video released today, one Planned Parenthood employee admitted she nearly passed out when she was asked to dismember a "freshly aborted" baby.

I say it's time to defund Planned Parenthood. Not next year. Not next month. But NOW!

I refuse to back down.

I'm counting on you to help me pass my bill to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

Please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood and then let me know you've got my back by **[adding your name](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362995:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r)** as a Citizen Co-Sponsor.

Planned Parenthood and their left-wing attack dogs have painted a giant target on my back as someone who poses a threat to their half a BILLION dollar a year taxpayer funded handout.

Hillary Clinton is rushing to Planned Parenthood's defense. And Friday night, Barack Obama released a "shout out" video thanking Planned Parenthood for their work.

Fellow Conservative, I'm taking on the entire left-wing machine here.

I need as many folks with me as possible in my corner.

So once you've added your name to this fight, please **[chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362995:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r)** to help me mobilize as many folks as possible to keep up the pressure to pass my bill.

Our efforts are paying off. And I've secured a commitment for a vote before next week's August recess.

But I need some extra grassroots muscle to pass my bill.

Please consider **[chipping in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362995:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r)** to help me mobilize even more Americans to our fight to defund Planned Parenthood.

Time is short. Please take immediate action.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362995:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362996:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362997:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29362998:28153188380:m:1:879035888:F55FE8F8846FD7BDD93CCE32CE3590DA:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: Update from the trail: Photos
body:
Friend,

I wanted to share a quick update from the road. I've been out traveling the country with Dad, it's been a great journey so far, but we're just getting started.

That's where you come in.

[**In just 3 days, we will hit our July fundraising deadline and we need your support of $100, $50, $25, or even $5 to hit our goal of $150,000 before midnight Friday.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/omwgskqnmlwdfpftdkvgmdcpqqdcnpsngkrkwnptfjkm_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1) This is a critical deadline, and unless we hit our goal, we're going to struggle to keep the campaign moving forward.

Why is this deadline so important? **Hillary has already outraised us, so we can 't fall further behind now.** Dad is out there every day showing his heart, and that's why it's so important that you step up now before our deadline on Friday.

Time is running out as we approach this critical deadline. Every minute we lose, we lose for good. We can't get this time back, so please, Friend, chip in $25 or more right now: [**Jeb2016.com/Donate**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/slcfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgbjvcp_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hwqrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdvnbcn_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/rvcfyklbwvgpjsjcpkqfwphsllphbsybfktkgbscjngc_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
I know you can bring us one step closer to meeting our deadline and closing the gap with Hillary today.

Thank you,

Jeb Jr.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ufybvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjhywnq_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1559&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: New Poll Results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
A new poll is out today that has Ohio Gov. John Kasich at #3 in
New Hampshire.

Peter, there is real momentum here and we could use
your help with our upcoming July 31st fundraising deadline.

Can you chip in with $25, $50 or more right now to help
us hit our goal?
https://johnkasich.com/hilary-and-democrats-are-worried-support-john-now/?sc=EM20150728/

Fox News' Chief White House Correspondent recently
mentioned that of all the GOP candidates, Hillary Clinton's team
is most worried about Gov. John Kasich.

They know what we know: Gov. Kasich has a record of
accomplishment, both in Ohio and in balancing the federal budget
for the first time since man walked on the moon.

With your help, we can win and go on to defeat Hillary in
2016!

Sincerely,

John Weaver

Chief Strategist

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fighting back with everything they have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Planned Parenthood is scrambling after my announcement that I've secured a vote on my bill to strip them of every last dime of taxpayer funding before the August recess.

And they're fighting back with everything they have to hang on to their taxpayer funded handouts.

With the Senate scheduled to recess August 7th, time is running out.

You and I have come so far in just the past few days, but we have very little time to mobilize. I need your help to dial up the pressure on my colleagues to vote for my bill.

So please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

**[And please let me know you've got my back by adding your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376246:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, the bad news just keeps coming for Planned Parenthood.

In a new video released today, one Planned Parenthood employee admitted she nearly passed out when she was asked to dismember a "freshly aborted" baby.

The video also catches a Planned Parenthood Vice President discussing how to maximize profits from selling the aborted baby parts, saying she thinks a "per-item thing works a little better, just because we can see how much we can get out of it."

But perhaps one of the most disgusting parts of the video shows a Planned Parenthood technician using tweezers to pick through a pile of aborted baby parts.

When the technician finds a pair of intact kidneys, someone off-camera laughs out loud and says "Five stars!"

Fellow Conservative, this is sickening. And Planned Parenthood knows they're in hot water.

They've even hired one of Washington's top Democratic PR firms in a desperate attempt to suppress coverage of the undercover videos.

And this massive PR firm is now threatening any reporter who dares to air the video because they know just how damaging they are to Planned Parenthood's very existence.

I'm afraid Planned Parenthood's attack dogs have painted a giant target on my back as the #1 threat to their half a BILLION dollars a year in taxpayer money.

But I refuse to back down.

With Congress' power of the purse, this is one fight you and I can win even with President Obama in the White House.

I'm counting on you to help me pass my bill to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

Please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and insist they "Stand with Rand" and vote for my bill to defund Planned Parenthood and then **[let me know you've got my back by adding your name as a Citizen Co-Sponsor](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376246:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r)**.

I need you in my corner on this one, Fellow Conservative.

Please **[chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help me mobilize as many folks as possible](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376246:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r)** to keep up the pressure to pass my bill.

Time is short. Please take immediate action.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376246:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376247:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376248:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29376249:28165820623:m:1:879035888:31A8133F10DCB8760027D0DA4BE6E661:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Why it's so important you come out Wednesday night
body:
#
Friend,
Something unprecedented is going to happen tomorrow night. Will you be able to say that you were a part of it?
Tomorrow night--Wednesday, July 29--in 3,146 homes, town squares, coffee shops and union halls, more than 82,000 people who support Bernie's campaign will participate in our first organizing meeting. You will see Bernie via live video, make new friends and help build the movement that's taking our country back from the billionaire class.
Will you be a part of it?
[**Yes, I want to find an organizing meeting near me!**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d70/2069660091/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50")
or
[**I can 't make it, but I'll contribute $3 to support these organizing meetings.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d71/2069660091/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29?refcode=em150728non-attendees-d")
We've got the people on our side--not the billionaires. Your small donations pay for the basic infrastructure that allows this movement to grow and grow and grow.
Here's what history looks like. Each dot on this map is an organizing meeting happening Wednesday night:
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d70/2069660091/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50")
**No other presidential campaign has had this many grassroots events this early on in the race** --not even President Obama. That's what I mean when I say tomorrow night will be historic.
At tomorrow night's organizing meetings, supporters in your community will meet each other and share their stories about why they support Bernie. Then there will be a live video of Bernie speaking about what our next steps will be to build our campaign in your neighborhood.
It's going to be a big night, team, and I hope you won't miss it. Will you join us?
[**Yes, I want to RSVP for an organizing meeting.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d70/2069660091/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50")
or
[**I can 't make it, but I'll contribute $3 to support these organizing meetings.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d71/2069660091/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29?refcode=em150728non-attendees-d")
Thank you for all you do.
Jeff Weaver
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d71/2069660091/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/july-29?refcode=em150728non-attendees-d")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d7e/2069660091/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d7f/2069660091/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d7c/2069660091/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb20ea/43f17890/5ccd5e36/621d6d7d/2069660091/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Tomorrow night--Wednesday, July 29--in 3,146 homes, town squares, coffee shops and union halls, more than 82,000 people who support Bernie's campaign will participate in our first organizing meeting. You will see Bernie via live video, make new friends and help build the movement that's taking our country back from the billionaire class. Will you be a part of it? name: Team Pataki
subject: George Pataki: Presidential candidate or farmer?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/89fc640770/sc=728eb
Both!

While many people best remember Governor Pataki from his leadership
throughout 9/11 and his record of cutting taxes, many people don't
know that Governor Pataki is a lifelong farmer who sells beef at a
farmers market right here in New York.

You can read about Governor Pataki and his farm in this recent Wall
Street Journal article -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/91d5a97bb9
.

It's clear. Governor Pataki is the only candidate running for
president who has the ability to connect with both Iowa farmers and
New Hampshire independents. These two groups are critical to winning
the Republican nomination.

But we need your help to get Governor Pataki's message out to the
voters. -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/6eca34789b/sc=728eb Please chip in $10, $25, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 right
now, so we can spread Governor Pataki's message of lower taxes and a
stronger national defense.

In 2016, the Republican Party cannot have a nominee who appeals only
to a small slice of the electorate. If we do, Hillary Clinton wins.
It's that simple.

That's why we need Governor Pataki. As both a farmer and a Governor
of a large state, he can appeal to the entirety of the ideological
spectrum and defeat Hillary Clinton next November.

If you agree we MUST defeat the Obama-Clinton team in November 2016,
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/6764112ee3/sc=728eb please contribute $10, $25, $100, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700 right
now.

Thank you,

Team Pataki

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/11f74e9ed2/sc=728eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/d74a40f2f5

http://cts.vresp.com/u?3cb1a75c5f/ace65cf3c9/mlpftw

Pataki for President
132 East 43rd Street #614
New York, New York 10017
